name: small cabin
hints: The ship's cabin below deck. There is a cot to sleep in.
GO COT to lie down and sleep. You may find useful items or have important events while resting.
GO COT to rest and find a note. Go UP to return to the ship deck.
notes: Ship's cabin below deck with a cot. GO COT leads to room 29 (cozy cot) where a note can be found. Up returns to the ship deck (room 6).
